[[King/Legends|King]] [[Mon Julpa]] led [[Tammuz-an/Legends|his planet's]] fleet from a '''command ship''' during the [[Battle of Tammuz-an]].<ref name="TPOT" />

==Characteristics==
The vessel appeared slightly different from the only other Tammuz-an capital ship seen, lacking a stern protrusion and having several smaller bow protrusions, which might have been connected to its weapons-systems.<ref name="TPOT" />

The bridge area was located underneath the main superstructure, with a command area similar to many other warships. The controllers and technicians were seated at consoles arranged around the main walking area.<ref name="TPOT" />

==History==
During the [[Battle of Tammuz-an]], King Julpa's fleet was led by this vessel, which participated in the frontline action against [[Gir Kybo Ren-Cha]]'s stolen Star Destroyer, the ''[[Demolisher]]''.<ref name="TPOT" />

==Appearances==
*{{DroidsCite|The Pirates of Tarnoonga}}
